## Hard Gates (Non-Negotiable)

| Gate | Command / Check | Applies |
|------|-----------------|---------|
| **Full solution ≥878** | `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal` | Every merge + closeout |
| **ReplayGolden 6/6** | `dotnet test …Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests… --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests"` | Every sim/delegation merge |
| **DelegationBridge ZERO touch** | `git diff main -- src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter/Bridge/DelegationBridge.cs` → empty | Unity-track stories (S30-06, S30-07) |
| **CatalogWriteGate extend-only** | `npx gitnexus impact CatalogWriteGate` before every edit | S30-02, S30-03, S30-04, S30-11 |
| **No 7208 sensor in CI** | Curated fixtures only in `dotnet test` | S30-04, S30-11 |
| **No physical TL forks** | `rg TlBranchDatabase\|BranchDatabase` → zero | S30-02, S30-03 |
| **Baltic combat isolation** | Production flip only with producer sign-off; isolated pins unchanged | S30-09 |

## Entry Criteria

1. Sprint 29 QA sign-off **APPROVED** (`production/qa/qa-signoff-sprint-29-2026-06-18.md`)
2. Smoke check PASS at S29 closeout (878/878)
3. All S30 must-have stories `ready-for-dev` in `sprint-status.yaml`
4. This QA plan exists

## Exit Criteria

1. All must-have stories PASS automated + manual gates
2. `/smoke-check sprint` PASS at closeout
3. `/team-qa sprint` sign-off **APPROVED** or **APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS**
4. No open S1/S2 bugs in delivered scope

## Verify Commands (Closeout)

```bash
export PATH="/home/username01/.dotnet:$PATH"
cd /home/username01/cmano-clone/cmano-clone
dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal
dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "WriteGate|Snapshot|TlTier|Scenario" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "Combat|Domain|Damage|Datalink" -v minimal
git diff HEAD -- src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter/Bridge/DelegationBridge.cs
npx gitnexus analyze . --force
```
